description: Load feature_stress.json and filter all nodes where file path contains 'producer'
result_summary: Found 67 nodes: 8 files (callbacks.cc/h, encoder.cc/h, legacy_encoder.cc/h, state_machine.cc/h, types.h, main.cc, producer_config.xml), 34 symbol nodes, 14 type nodes. Key types: ProducerFSM, ProducerState, ProducerConfig, EncodingPath, RawBytes, MessageBody, Payload, PayloadHandle, PayloadHandlePP, LegacyEvent_CC.

description: Extract calls/produces/consumes/typedef_of edges for producer nodes
result_summary: ~140 relevant edges. main calls fsm_init and fsm_run. FSM handlers dispatch through encode_payload and dispatch_event. encode_payload calls select_serializer, serialize_proto, transmit_message, dispatch_event.

description: Find trigger_event and related event trigger functions
result_summary: 4 event triggers: trigger_event (IDLE), ack_received_event (ACK), timeout_event (retry/error), error_event (error handler). All route through dispatch_event to EventBus.

description: Trace RawBytes typedef chain via typedef_of edges — check for ptr_depth attribute
result_summary: Found ptr_depth IS stored on typedef_of edges: MessageBody->RawBytes (ptr_depth=0), Payload->MessageBody (ptr_depth=1), PayloadHandle->Payload (ptr_depth=2), PayloadHandlePP->PayloadHandle (ptr_depth=3).

description: Find LegacyEvent_CC type and legacy encoding path
result_summary: LegacyEvent_CC defined in legacy_encoder.h. build_legacy_event() produces it; serialize_wsdl() consumes it. handle_transmitting calls both.
select_serializer calls both serialize_proto and serialize_wsdl (both paths encoded as calls edges). Also consumes ProducerConfig.

description: Find EventBus and all producer nodes with edges to it
result_summary: EventBus (stress::relay::EventBus type). 18+ edges from producer: dispatch_event, on_state_change, register_callbacks, subscribe_all all interact with EventBus.

description: Check for relay field on producer edges
result_summary: relay field NOT present on producer edges — correctly absent. relay:true semantics only on broker files (relay.cc).
ProducerFSM struct: state (ProducerState), encoding_path (EncodingPath), config (ProducerConfig), bus (EventBus*), ack_received (int), retry_count (int).
